## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Validation

- [ ] `go test ./...` (in `app/`)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` (in `web/`)
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` (in `web/`)
- [ ] `pnpm build` (in `web/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and no unrelated changes are included
- [ ] Docs/configs are updated when behavior changes
- [ ] Tests were added/updated when needed
- [ ] No sensitive data is introduced
